plugins.name: aced
plugins.description: Agent Config Evaluation System. Evaluate, test, and improve agent configurations: skills, AGENTS.md sections, subagent definitions, and commands.

plugins.name: cyberfleet
plugins.description: Fleet persona layer for the cyberfleet CLI. Pod (ship's bridge) and Operator (command center) gateway skills — harness-agnostic, MCP-free.

plugins.name: cyberlegion
plugins.description: Agent session spawning, messaging, and dispatch — the Legion and its Legate.

plugins.name: cyberspace
plugins.description: Research and design toolkit for building universal AI coding agent plugins that work across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: quill
plugins.description: Documentation SDD plugin. Verifies guides, tutorials, articles, and reference docs against specs — existence, required headings, completeness, and reader-path continuity.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development. Scaffold, validate, and maintain behavioral specs (spec.md + .feature files) for software features.
